note_text: Wound note - Leftheel. Meas 4.4x3.4x1.4cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 79% gran, 21% slough. Periwound intact. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Lefebvre notified.
Wound note - Leftheel. Meas 4.4x3.4x1.4cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 73% gran, 27% slough. Periwound intact. Collagen dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Okafor notified.
